hasAttributes.name: fi_DirectDebitId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for entity instances.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was modified.

hasAttributes.name: statecode
hasAttributes.description: Status of the FI Direct Debit1.

hasAttributes.name: statuscode
hasAttributes.description: Reason for the status of the FI Direct Debit1.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Sequence number of the import that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: timeZoneRuleVersionNumber
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: UTCConversionTimeZoneCode
hasAttributes.description: Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: name
hasAttributes.description: Required name field.

hasAttributes.name: creditoridentifier
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the creditor for the direct debit.

hasAttributes.name: creditorname
hasAttributes.description: The creditor to whom the direct debit is made from customer's account (such as automatic payments to a utility company).

hasAttributes.name: debtoraccount
hasAttributes.description: Account number from which a direct debit is executed for a payment or standing order.

hasAttributes.name: financialinstrumenttype
hasAttributes.description: The type of financial instrument (Direct debit, Standing order, Card, Overdraft).

hasAttributes.name: integrationKey
hasAttributes.description: Used by the system integrator to uniquely define the data record .

hasAttributes.name: lastitemamount
hasAttributes.description: Last direct debit amount.

hasAttributes.name: lastitemamount_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the last item amount in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: lastitemamount_default
hasAttributes.description: Last direct debit amount. Value should be converted to base currency.

hasAttributes.name: lastitemdate
hasAttributes.description: Last direct debit date.

hasAttributes.name: lastitemstatus
hasAttributes.description: Last direct debit status (successful, rejected, failed).

hasAttributes.name: lastitemstatusreason
hasAttributes.description: The reason for the last direct debit.

hasAttributes.name: mandateenddate
hasAttributes.description: Date when the direct debit mandate expires.

hasAttributes.name: mandateid
hasAttributes.description: Direct debit mandate identifier.

hasAttributes.name: mandatelimit
hasAttributes.description: The limit amount set for direct debit authorization.

hasAttributes.name: mandatelimit_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the mandate limit in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: mandatelimit_default
hasAttributes.description: The limit amount set for direct debit authorization. Value should be converted to base currency.

hasAttributes.name: mandatestartdate
hasAttributes.description: The date on which the direct debit mandate was given.

hasAttributes.name: nextitemamount
hasAttributes.description: The amount of the next direct debit.

hasAttributes.name: nextitemamount_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the next item amount in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: nextitemamount_default
hasAttributes.description: The amount of the next direct debit. Value should be converted to base currency.

hasAttributes.name: nextitemdate
hasAttributes.description: Next direct debit date.

hasAttributes.name: orderenddate
hasAttributes.description: The end date of the standing order.

hasAttributes.name: standingOrderAmount
hasAttributes.description: Amount to be regularly transferred.

definitions.description: An automated payment system whereby an account holder authorizes a creditor to debit the customer's bank account at regular intervals.
